<!-- generated by docs:generate; safe to hand-edit; rerun overwrites -->
# cc-plugins

A Claude Code plugin marketplace shipped as one git repo. Each plugin lives under `plugins/<name>/` with a `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` manifest and user-invoked skills (`/<plugin>:<skill>`, e.g. `/prompt:draft`). No runtime, no build — the product is configuration plus stdlib Python helpers.

## Commands

- Run evals → `python3 evals/run.py all` (subcommands `trigger`, `lint`, `output`; scope with `--item plugins/<name>`).
- Install locally → `/plugins marketplace add <abs-path>`, then `/plugins install <name>@cc-plugins`.
- Pre-commit hook (one-time per clone) → `git config core.hooksPath .githooks`.

## Where things live

- Marketplace catalog → `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
- Per-plugin manifest → `plugins/<name>/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
- Skills → `plugins/<name>/skills/<skill>/SKILL.md` (+ optional `scripts/`, `references/`)
- Eval cases → `evals/<plugin>/cases.json`; harness → `evals/run.py`
- Pre-commit hook → `.githooks/pre-commit`

## Gotchas

- **Stdlib only.** All Python runs on `python3` with no `pip install`; helpers must follow.
- **Helpers emit JSON; the skill body synthesizes prose.** Don't put presentation in the helper or scanning in the skill body — reference `plugins/repo/skills/audit/scripts/audit.py`.
- **Skill descriptions are tuned for triggering** (action-verb opener + the `/<plugin>:<skill>` form spelled out) — mirror `plugins/prompt/skills/review/SKILL.md`.
- **Read-only skills enumerate their `Bash` allowlist** — reference `plugins/code/skills/review/SKILL.md`.
- **Use `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}`** for asset paths inside `SKILL.md`, never relative paths.
- The pre-commit hook runs the full eval suite; bypass with `PRE_COMMIT_SKIP_EVALS=1` or `--no-verify`.

## Where to start

| Task | Start in | Then read | Verify |
|------|----------|-----------|--------|
| Add a new plugin | `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` | an existing `plugins/<name>/.claude-plugin/plugin.json` | `python3 evals/run.py lint` |
| Add a skill to a plugin | `plugins/<name>/skills/` | `plugins/prompt/skills/review/SKILL.md` (description + structure idiom) | `python3 evals/run.py all --item plugins/<name>` |
| Add or change eval cases | `evals/<plugin>/cases.json` | `evals/run.py` (assertion contract) | `python3 evals/run.py all --item plugins/<plugin>` |
| Tune a skill's triggering | the skill's `description` frontmatter | `evals/<plugin>/cases.json` (`triggers`) | `python3 evals/run.py trigger` |
| Work on the prompt plugin | `plugins/prompt/` | that area's `CLAUDE.md` | — |
